C HAPTE R 3 Tamlin’s guilt must have hit him hard, because although he was gone the next day, Lucien was waiting with an offer to inspect the progress on the nearby village. I hadn’t visited in well over a month—I couldn’t remember the last time I’d even left the grounds.
